data.name: Please FUCK ME my SEXY neighbor
data.detailed_description:
Please FUCK ME my neighbor this is an adult porn game. As a player, you find yourself in a suburb inhabited only by rich women.

Rich horny women are very debauched.
They love to have sex without strings attached.
They invite men to fuck them.

You start the game on a street in the suburbs.

Moving down the street you have several houses where horny rich women live.

You can enter one of them and have fun with a horny woman.

Along the street there are also places for outdoor sex.
Want to have fun with two girls?? - they are waiting for you...
You like to watch others do it - a couple of lovers are ready to show how they fuck...

What you will find in the game:

- A street with houses in the suburbs
- Ability to enter 5 houses with girls
- Outdoor sex poses (not animated)
- Glory hole room with three positions
- About thirty girl sex positions (not animated)
- Three animations of a couple having sex
- About ten lesbian sex positions (not animated)
- Penetration of girls with dildos
- and much more...

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-6600 (or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce RTX 2060
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: Steam VR

建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
